_meta.description: All 62 candlestick patterns from TA-Lib CDL pattern recognition, plus additional SMC/ICT concepts. These are boolean detection functions (0/1 signals).

patterns.label: Doji
patterns.description: Open ≈ close — market indecision, potential reversal

patterns.label: Dragonfly Doji
patterns.description: Long lower wick, open/close at high — bullish reversal after downtrend

patterns.label: Gravestone Doji
patterns.description: Long upper wick, open/close at low — bearish reversal after uptrend

patterns.label: Long-Legged Doji
patterns.description: Long wicks both sides — extreme indecision, high volatility

patterns.label: Hammer
patterns.description: Small body, long lower wick in downtrend — bullish reversal

patterns.label: Hanging Man
patterns.description: Small body, long lower wick in uptrend — bearish reversal

patterns.label: Shooting Star
patterns.description: Small body, long upper wick in uptrend — bearish reversal

patterns.label: Inverted Hammer
patterns.description: Small body, long upper wick in downtrend — bullish reversal

patterns.label: Marubozu
patterns.description: No wicks — strong momentum (bullish or bearish)

patterns.label: Closing Marubozu
patterns.description: No wick on close side — strong momentum at close

patterns.label: Opening Marubozu
patterns.description: No wick on open side — strong momentum at open

patterns.label: Spinning Top
patterns.description: Small body, wicks both sides — weakening momentum, potential reversal

patterns.label: Long Candle
patterns.description: Large body relative to recent candles — strong momentum

patterns.label: Short Candle
patterns.description: Small body relative to recent candles — low momentum/consolidation

patterns.label: Bullish Belt Hold
patterns.description: Long white candle from open low — strong bullish opening

patterns.label: Bearish Belt Hold
patterns.description: Long black candle from open high — strong bearish opening

patterns.label: Bullish Engulfing
patterns.description: White body fully engulfs previous black body — strong bullish reversal

patterns.label: Bearish Engulfing
patterns.description: Black body fully engulfs previous white body — strong bearish reversal

patterns.label: Bullish Harami
patterns.description: Small white body inside previous black body — weak bullish reversal

patterns.label: Bearish Harami
patterns.description: Small black body inside previous white body — weak bearish reversal

patterns.label: Harami Cross
patterns.description: Doji inside previous body — stronger reversal than regular harami

patterns.label: Piercing Line
patterns.description: White candle closes above 50% of previous black body — bullish reversal

patterns.label: Dark Cloud Cover
patterns.description: Black candle closes below 50% of previous white body — bearish reversal

patterns.label: Tweezer Top
patterns.description: Two candles with same high in uptrend — bearish reversal

patterns.label: Tweezer Bottom
patterns.description: Two candles with same low in downtrend — bullish reversal

patterns.label: Thrusting Line
patterns.description: White candle closes in black body but not above midpoint — weak bullish

patterns.label: In-Neck Line
patterns.description: White candle closes at previous black close — weak bullish signal

patterns.label: On-Neck Line
patterns.description: White candle closes at previous black low — very weak bullish

patterns.label: Bullish Kicking
patterns.description: Marubozu gap opposite direction — powerful reversal

patterns.label: Bearish Kicking
patterns.description: Marubozu gap opposite direction — powerful reversal

patterns.label: Matching Low
patterns.description: Two black candles with same close — support, potential reversal

patterns.label: Bullish Separating Lines
patterns.description: Black then white at same open — trend continuation

patterns.label: Bearish Separating Lines
patterns.description: White then black at same open — trend continuation

patterns.label: Morning Star
patterns.description: Bear → doji/star → bull gap — major bullish reversal

patterns.label: Morning Doji Star
patterns.description: Same with doji as middle candle — stronger reversal signal

patterns.label: Evening Star
patterns.description: Bull → doji/star → bear gap — major bearish reversal

patterns.label: Evening Doji Star
patterns.description: Same with doji as middle candle — stronger reversal signal

patterns.label: Three White Soldiers
patterns.description: 3 long white bodies with higher closes — strong uptrend

patterns.label: Three Black Crows
patterns.description: 3 long black bodies with lower closes — strong downtrend

patterns.label: Three Inside Up
patterns.description: Bear → harami → white above harami — bullish reversal

patterns.label: Three Inside Down
patterns.description: Bull → harami → black below harami — bearish reversal

patterns.label: Three Outside Up
patterns.description: Bear → engulfing white → higher close — bullish reversal

patterns.label: Three Outside Down
patterns.description: Bull → engulfing black → lower close — bearish reversal

patterns.label: Three Stars South
patterns.description: 3 consecutive dojis with lower lows — capitulation, bottom

patterns.label: Bullish 3-Line Strike
patterns.description: 3 black candles then 1 white above all — shakeout reversal

patterns.label: Bearish 3-Line Strike
patterns.description: 3 white candles then 1 black below all — distribution reversal

patterns.label: Rising Three Methods
patterns.description: Long white + 3 small bears inside range — bullish continuation

patterns.label: Falling Three Methods
patterns.description: Long black + 3 small bulls inside range — bearish continuation

patterns.label: Advance Block
patterns.description: 3 white candles with shrinking bodies — weakening uptrend

patterns.label: Deliberation
patterns.description: 2 strong white + 1 doji — potential uptrend exhaustion

patterns.label: Stalled Pattern
patterns.description: Long white + gap + doji — uptrend stalling, potential reversal

patterns.label: Upside Gap Two Crows
patterns.description: White + bear gap + black below white — bearish reversal

patterns.label: Downside Gap Three Methods
patterns.description: 3 candles filling a gap — bearish continuation pattern

patterns.label: Downside Gap Two Crows (alt)
patterns.description: Variant of gap reversal pattern

patterns.label: Upside Gap Three Methods
patterns.description: 3 candles filling a gap — bullish continuation pattern

patterns.label: Bullish Abandoned Baby
patterns.description: Bear + doji gap + white gap — major island reversal

patterns.label: Bearish Abandoned Baby
patterns.description: White + doji gap + black gap — major island reversal

patterns.label: Bullish Breakaway
patterns.description: 5-candle pattern: selloff → gap → consolidation → gap up — reversal

patterns.label: Bearish Breakaway
patterns.description: 5-candle pattern: rally → gap → consolidation → gap down — reversal

patterns.label: Concealing Baby Swallow
patterns.description: 4 black candles, 3rd small body within 2nd, 4th engulfs all — bottom

patterns.label: Bullish Counterattack
patterns.description: Black then white both close at same level — potential reversal

patterns.label: Bearish Counterattack
patterns.description: White then black both close at same level — potential reversal

patterns.label: Bullish Doji Star
patterns.description: Long black + doji gap down — reversal signal

patterns.label: Bearish Doji Star
patterns.description: Long white + doji gap up — reversal signal

patterns.label: Gap Side White (Up/Down)
patterns.description: White candle that closes a gap — continuation confirmation

patterns.label: Bullish Hikkake Modified
patterns.description: Hikkake (false breakout) pattern — bullish variant

patterns.label: Bearish Hikkake Modified
patterns.description: Hikkake (false breakout) pattern — bearish variant

patterns.label: Hikkake Pattern
patterns.description: False breakout trap — inside day then break opposite direction

patterns.label: Homing Pigeon
patterns.description: Smaller black inside larger black — bullish harami variant

patterns.label: Identical Three Crows
patterns.description: 3 black candles with equal or similar closes — strong bearish

patterns.label: Ladder Bottom
patterns.description: 4 black + 1 white gap — bullish reversal after capitulation

patterns.label: Long Line Candle
patterns.description: Candle with body > threshold% of range — direction signal

patterns.label: Master Doji
patterns.description: All candles in lookback are dojis — extreme indecision

patterns.label: Bullish Tasuki Gap
patterns.description: Gap up + black that doesn't fill gap — bullish continuation

patterns.label: Bearish Tasuki Gap
patterns.description: Gap down + white that doesn't fill gap — bearish continuation

patterns.label: Unique Three River
patterns.description: Long black + lower low then higher close — bullish bottom pattern
